title: pelargonion radulum
parts: Pelargonion radulum has many medicinal parts, such as its leaves, flowers, and roots. The leaves of the Pelargonion radulum plant contain flavonoids and glycosides, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and inflammation. The flowers of this plant are rich in naphthoquinones and anthocyanins, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The roots of the Pelargonion radulum plant contain iridoids and phenolic acids, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever and rheumatism.
